title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCI. Games.
content:
Is John Smith within? - 
        Yes, that he is.
        Can he set a shoe? - 
        Ay, marry, two,
        Here a nail, there a nail,
        Tick, tack, too.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCXCI. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
